title: Supply Woes, Weak Demand Cause Deepest Decline in PC Shipments
text: Tepid consumer demand for PCs, lockdowns in China, supply-chain bottlenecks, plus logistics and geopolitical challenges induce the steepest personal computer shipment decline in years, according to Gartner and International Data Corporation.

title: Dell'Oro Group Research Recognizes Aryaka as Delivering SASE with Unified Security and Network Connectivity
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #SASE--Aryaka®, the leader in fully managed SD-WAN and SASE solutions, today announced the company has been recognized by Dell'Oro Research Group as the newest technology vendor to deliver a unified secure access service edge (SASE) solution that tightly combines security and network connectivity.
